headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日娱乐热搜榜
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》《海洋奇缘：启航》等话题持续火热。本周新片《火遮眼》加入竞争，未来《奥德赛》《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》备受期待。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' and 'Moana: Voyage' remain hot. New film 'Blinded by Fire' joins this week's lineup, with 'Odyssey' and 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 《痴迷》连续多日蝉联热搜第一
industryHighlights.en: 'Obsession' tops trending for multiple days straight

industryHighlights.text: 《火遮眼》本周新上榜，口碑不俗
industryHighlights.en: 'Blinded by Fire' debuts this week with strong reviews

industryHighlights.text: 《奥德赛》与《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将上映引期待
industryHighlights.en: 'Odyssey' and 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day' upcoming generate buzz
